summary: Comprehensive testing of Carloop car dealer website completed. Backend APIs working at 86.7% success rate, frontend UI fully functional with all core features operational. Admin dashboard, customer flows, and luxury design implementation verified successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_issues.impact: Very low - standard HTTP behavior variation

minor_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console during development
Minor script issue with .clear() method on input fields

passed_tests: Featured cars section (3 luxury cars displayed)
Inventory page with search and filtering (fuel type, transmission, price range)
Car detail page with specifications and enquiry form submission
Contact page form submission with success confirmation
Admin login with credentials admin@carloop.com / admin123
Admin dashboard car management (view, add, edit operations)
Backend API endpoints (cars CRUD, enquiries, authentication)
Luxury automotive design implementation with Teko/Manrope fonts
